entries.title: A scorecard for the AI age
entries.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

entries.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
entries.summary: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.

entries.title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
entries.summary: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.

entries.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
entries.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

entries.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
entries.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

entries.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
entries.summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

entries.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
entries.summary: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

entries.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
entries.summary: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
